2605.20467.title: High Quality Embeddings for Horn Logic Reasoning
2605.20467.paper_summary: Neural networks can be trained to rank the choices made by logical reasoners, resulting in more efficient searches for answers. A key step in this process is creating useful embeddings, i.e., numeric representations of logical statements. This paper introduces and evaluates several approaches to creating embeddings that result in better downstream results. We train embeddings using triplet loss, which requires examples consisting of an anchor, a positive example, and a negative example. We introduce three ideas: generating anchors that are more likely to have repeated terms, generating positive and negative examples in a way that ensures a good balance between easy, medium, and hard examples, and periodically emphasizing the hardest examples during training. We conduct several experiments to evaluate this approach, including a comparison of different embeddings across different knowledge bases, in an attempt to identify what characteristics make an embedding well-suited to a particular reasoning task.
2605.20467.paper_summary_zh: 神經網絡可以被訓練來對邏輯推理者所做的選擇進行排名，從而實現更有效的答案搜尋。這一過程中的一個關鍵步驟是創建有用的嵌入，即邏輯陳述的數字表示。本文介紹並評估了幾種創建嵌入的方法，這些方法能夠產生更好的下游結果。我們使用三元組損失來訓練嵌入，這需要由一個錨點、一個正例和一個負例組成的示例。我們提出了三個想法：生成更可能包含重複術語的錨點，以確保在簡單、中等和困難示例之間保持良好的平衡的方式生成正例和負例，以及在訓練過程中定期強調最困難的示例。我們進行了幾個實驗來評估這種方法，包括比較不同知識庫中的不同嵌入，試圖確定哪些特徵使得嵌入適合特定的推理任務。
2605.20467.author: Yifan Zhang et.al.
2605.20467.authors: Yifan Zhang, Yasir White, Dean Clark, Joseph Sanchez, Jevon Lipsey, Ashely Hirst, Jeff Heflin
